violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was placed out of order, ice machine was turned off. Establishment placed call for replacement ice. Establishment is to send photos of clean and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH before resuming use of machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Low areas of grout between floor tiles were observed through out the kitchen. Broken tiles were observed by the back freezer. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The cover on the ice machine was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2024

Wood is used in the construction of shelving and legs of counter at front counter area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Wood was observed to be black and is in close proximity to floor and areas that are exposed to moisture. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the flooring and area behind 3 bay sink and mop room was observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Areas need to be cleaned on a more frequent basis. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The tile flooring at threshold to freezer was observed in poor repair, tile flooring at mop sink was observed poor repair. Flooring in these areas needs to be repaired. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2024

The floor through out the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Areas of low grout must be re-grouted. The floor infront of the walk in freezer must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2024
